title: Citrusy Flaky Indulgent Spanish Almond Pilaf
description: A citrus-infused and almond-flavored dish, perfect for a breakfast or dessert offering with high-protein elements.
instructions: Toast almonds in a dry skillet until lightly golden, set aside.
Peel and mince garlic; finely chop celery stalks.
Heat vegetable oil in a pan over medium heat. Add minced garlic and sauté for about 1 minute.
Add chopped celery to the pan with some salt. Sauté for another 2 minutes until softened.
Fold in toasted almonds, add coconut milk, lemon juice, orange juice, saffron threads, and sesame seeds. Stir well.
Bring the mixture to a simmer, then reduce heat to low. Cover and let it cook for about 10-15 minutes or until most liquid is absorbed.
Preheat your baking sheet or tray at 375°F (190°C). Spread rice pilaf on the hot surface and sprinkle with toasted almonds.
